title: Star Citizen | A Year in the ‘Verse 2955
description:
What a year it’s been in the ‘verse! Pyro and Nyx have expanded our stars, Wikelo has set up shop in Stanton, turf wars and dark experiments have gripped Humanity, and we saw the launch of iconic vehicles. To our citizens all over the world, thank you for an epic 2955.

------------------------------------------
Roberts Space Industries is a spacecraft manufacturer within the persistent-world game "Star Citizen" and its companion single-player spaceflight sim, "Squadron 42."  RSI is also your portal for information, updates, and purchases of your very own spacecraft with which to trade, plunder, and protect the citizens of Star Citizen.

title: Star Citizen Live SPECIAL EDITION: A More Stable Universe
description:
After a short break, we’re back! Join us for the first Star Citizen Live of the year as CTO Benoit Beausejour discusses upcoming improvements, stability enhancements, and how we’re working to make the player experience better moving forward.

00:00 Monologue About the Future
08:30 Show Begins
09:15 Meet Benoit Beausejour
10:10 The Old Ways
17:33 All About Alpha 4.0
38:30 Letter From the Chairman
44:25 Stability
49:22 Performance
51:40 Who Does This Work?
53:25 Putting Words into Motion
01:15:45 All About Alpha 4.0.1
01:26:24 Persistent Bugiverse
01:27:50 Server Instability and Character Stowing
01:42:27 Elevators and Trams
01:50:14 Hangars
02:04:00 Inventory and Item Issues
02:15:00 Mission Bugs
02:23:40 Quantum Travel
02:26:40 Prison
02:29:50 Mining
02:33:33 Vulkan and Nvidia Drivers
02:35:25 Issue Council Issues
02:41:38 Error Codes
02:46:46 Going Forward
02:52:00 Dad Lando
